emails.subject: Puget Sound Energy, Inc.
emails.body: Puget Sound Energy, Inc. Holly Krebbs just did a deal with these guys (short form) but they want to negotiate an ISDA. We need to send an updated form to them. Will there be any credit changes?

emails.subject: Puget Sound Energy, Inc.
emails.body: Puget Sound Energy, Inc. I just finished neogtiating Annex A with this CP and its lawyer for the 8-month financial deal effective 2/1/00. The CP is anxious to receive an ISDA so that the ISDA will govern this transaction and future transactions. Please let me know who will prepare credit (since the CP knows my phone number and is awaiting receipt of a draft!). Thanks. Sara

emails.subject: Re: Puget Sound Energy, Inc.
emails.body: Re: Puget Sound Energy, Inc. I created this w/s for Marci Youngerman and sent it to the paralegals in March-99. Lotus notes says that a draft went out in that month. I'm still okay with the credit in that draft. Sara Shackleton 02/02/2000 03:53 PM
